# kSecClass

**Global Variable**

A dictionary key whose value is the item’s class.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecClass: CFString
```

## Discussion

Possible values for this key are listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-class-keys-and-values#Item-class-values].
